title: The Buried Giant
author: Kazuo Ishiguro
reason: Ishiguro on memory and forgetting. A considered addition to our literature collection.

title: Under the Udala Trees
author: Chinelo Okparanta
reason: A Nigerian novel about identity and resilience during and after the Biafran War.

title: The Mushroom at the End of the World
author: Anna Lowenhaupt Tsing
reason: Tsing on ecology, capitalism, and survival. Rigorous and relevant to our ecology collection.

title: Sculpture in the Age of Doubt
author: Thomas McEvilley
reason: Critical reading on contemporary sculpture and its philosophical foundations.
